debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

  have hb' : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
  rw [integral_add (by apply IntervalIntegrable.div_const; exact intervalIntegrable_inv this)
      (by apply IntervalIntegrable.div_const; exact intervalIntegrable_inv (by simpa using this))]
  rw [integral_one_div (by exact fun x hx => Set.not_mem_of_mem_diff_of_mem hx this) (Or.inl ha'),
      div_one, div_one]
  have : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = 1 / a - 1 / b := by
    have h1 : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = ∫ x in a..b, x ^ (-2 : ℤ) := by
      congr 1; ext x; rw [zpow_neg, zpow_two, one_div]
    rw [h1, integral_zpow (by right; exact this)]
    simp only [zpow_neg, zpow_one]
    ring
  rw [this]
  ring

have h1 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ≠ 0 := fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    have hd1 : HasDerivAt log (1 / x) x := hasDerivAt_log hx'
    have hd2 : HasDerivAt (fun x => 1 / x) (-1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x => x⁻¹) (-x⁻¹ ^ 2) x := hasDerivAt_inv hx'
      simp only [one_div, inv_pow] at this ⊢
      convert this using 1
      ring
    have hd3 : HasDerivAt (fun x => -1 / x) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x => -(1 / x)) (-(- 1 / x ^ 2)) x := hd2.neg
      simp only [neg_neg] at this
      convert this using 2
      ring
    convert hd1.add hd3 using 1
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h1 (by apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; continuity)]
  ring

have h1 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ≠ 0 := fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    have hd1 : HasDerivAt log (1 / x) x := hasDerivAt_log hx'
    have hd2 : HasDerivAt (fun x => 1 / x) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x => x⁻¹) (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹) x := hasDerivAt_inv hx'
      simp only [one_div, inv_pow] at this ⊢
      exact this
    have hd := hd1.sub hd2
    convert hd using 1
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h1 _]
  · ring
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · exact continuousOn_one_div_uIcc this
    · apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const _ (fun x hx => pow_ne_zero 2 (fun h => this (h ▸ hx)))
      exact continuousOn_pow 2

have h1 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ≠ 0 := fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    have hd1 : HasDerivAt log (1 / x) x := by
      have := Real.hasDerivAt_log hx'
      convert this using 1
      ring
    have hd2 : HasDerivAt (fun x => 1 / x) (-1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x => x⁻¹) (-x⁻¹ ^ 2) x := hasDerivAt_inv hx'
      convert this using 1 <;> field_simp
    convert hd1.sub hd2 using 1
    field_simp
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_le (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le ha (uIcc_subset_uIcc_left (left_mem_uIcc) ▸ inf_le_left))) 
    (fun x hx => h1 x (uIcc_of_le (le_of_lt (lt_trans ha hb)) ▸ Icc_subset_uIcc hx)) ?_]
  · ring
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · exact continuousOn_const.div continuousOn_id fun x hx => fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    · apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const (continuousOn_pow 2)
      intro x hx h
      simp only [sq_eq_zero_iff] at h
      exact this (h ▸ hx)

have h1 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ≠ 0 := fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    have hxpos : 0 < x ∨ x < 0 := hx'.lt_or_lt
    have hder1 : HasDerivAt log (1 / x) x := by
      cases hxpos with
      | inl hp => exact hasDerivAt_log hx'
      | inr hn => exact hasDerivAt_log hx'
    have hder2 : HasDerivAt (fun x => 1 / x) (-(1 / x ^ 2)) x := by
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x => x⁻¹) (-(x ^ 2)⁻¹) x := hasDerivAt_inv hx'
      simp only [one_div, inv_pow] at this ⊢
      exact this
    have hder3 : HasDerivAt (fun x => -1 / x) (1 / x ^ 2) x := by
      have : HasDerivAt (fun x => -(1 / x)) (-(-(1 / x ^ 2))) x := hder2.neg
      simp only [neg_neg, neg_div] at this
      convert this using 1
      ring
    convert hder1.sub hder2 using 1
    ring
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt_of_le (le_of_lt (lt_trans ha hb) |>.trans (le_refl _) |> fun _ => ?_) 
      (fun x hx => h1 x (Icc_subset_uIcc hx)) ?_]
  · ring
  · exact ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable (by continuity) a b |> fun _ => ?_
    apply IntervalIntegrable.add
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const continuousOn_id
      intro x hx
      exact fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const (continuousOn_pow 2)
      intro x hx
      simp only [pow_eq_zero_iff, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true]
      exact fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
  · intro x hx
    exact h1 x (Icc_subset_uIcc hx)
  · apply IntervalIntegrable.add
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const continuousOn_id
      intro x hx
      exact fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const (continuousOn_pow 2)
      intro x hx
      simp only [pow_eq_zero_iff, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true]
      exact fun h => this (h ▸ hx)

have h1 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun x => log x - 1 / x) (1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2) x := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ≠ 0 := fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    have := (hasDerivAt_log hx').sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx')
    simp only [one_div] at this ⊢
    convert this using 1
    field_simp
  rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt h1 (by apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; continuity)]
  ring

have h1 : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], x ≠ 0 := fun x hx => fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
  rw [integral_add (by apply IntervalIntegrable.div_const; apply intervalIntegrable_const)
    (by apply IntervalIntegrable.div; apply intervalIntegrable_const; intro x hx; exact pow_ne_zero 2 (h1 x hx))]
  rw [integral_one_div (fun x hx => h1 x hx) (Or.inl ha)]
  have : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = 1 / a - 1 / b := by
    have eq1 : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = ∫ x in a..b, x ^ (-2 : ℤ) := by
      apply intervalIntegral.integral_congr
      intro x _
      simp [one_div, zpow_neg, zpow_natCast]
    rw [eq1, integral_zpow (by right; exact fun hx => h1 x hx)]
    simp only [zpow_neg_one]
    ring
  rw [this]
  ring
